case_title: DELAO ELECTRIC, INC. VS. YASIN SALMA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: AMENDMENT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO ADD DEFENDANT SALMA & COMPANY & RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAO ELECTRIC, INC.
REMOVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON JAN-24-2019 IN DEPT. 506 - DUPLICATE ENTRY.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF ON DEC-11-2018.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2018 - CONTINUED TO JAN-24-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF IS TO AMEND THE CLAIM TO NAME THE APPROPRIATE PARTY. PLAINTIFF DELAO ELECTRIC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PAUL LENZO PERSONAL ASSISTANT. PLAINTIFF DELAO ELECTRIC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY WILLIAM DELAO PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT YASIN SALMA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SALMA, YASIN

ORDER RE: CONTINUED TO AMEND CLAIM. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAO ELECTRIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SALMA & COMPANY
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
